description_long: This is a large, two-story house with a symmetrical facade, surrounded by palm trees and lush landscaping. The front features a prominent double-door entryway with a semi-circular driveway and a paved approach, flanked by tall windows and decorative shutters. The rear of the house opens to a spacious backyard with a rectangular swimming pool, bordered by a row of palm trees and a manicured garden. The roof is mostly flat with some raised sections and a central glass atrium or skylight above the entry. The exterior is finished in a light, neutral color, with white and beige tones dominating the palette. The overall design blends modern and Mediterranean influences, with clean lines, large windows, and a resort-like outdoor area.
description: A large, two-story house with a flat roof, symmetrical facade, palm trees, and a backyard pool, blending modern and Mediterranean styles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, semi-circular driveway, symmetrical windows, and palm trees lining the approach.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the house, the backyard pool, and the arrangement of palm trees around the property.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the swimming pool, garden, and the back facade with large windows and patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, sun loungers, and the continuation of palm trees and landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Double-door entry with a semi-circular driveway, steps, and flanking columns, accented by large windows and decorative shutters.
